name: Vegetable Fish Filets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the filets in a single layer in an oiled 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Heat oil over medium heat, sauté onion, zucchini, and green pepper until crisp-tender. Spoon vegetables over the filets.
3. Top with tomatoes and chopped tomatoes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine sherry (optional), lemon juice, salt, basil, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Pour mixture over the filets.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Remove fish and vegetables to a heated platter. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. If desired, serve pan juices over bulgur or rice.
